Question: The angular frequency of the oscillations in an LC circuit is $$2.0 \times 10^{3}$$ rad/s. (a) If $$L = 0.10 \text{H}$$ , what is C ? (b) Suppose that at $$t = 0 ,$$ all the energy is stored in the inductor. What is the value of $$\upphi ?$$ (c) A second identical capacitor is connected in parallel with the original capacitor. What is the angular frequency of this circuit?
